meta.description: Creates a rgb-split glow for the highlights of the image.

meta.description: Creates a vortex distortion from the input using directional blur

meta.description: Uses the input as a UV-map for a brick texture, so the input will be split into less colors and recieves an outline

meta.description: Emulates visual artifacts of digital corruption caused by faulty drivers or broken GPUs, cables and displays.

meta.author: Moportfolio
meta.description: Removes coarse seperated pixels of a mask.

meta.description: Adjusts the local contrast of details. Has adjustments for the Texture, Detail and Clarity, which each target different detail level.

meta.author: Moportfolio
meta.description: Scatters the input into multiple tiny points.

meta.author: Moportfolio
meta.description: You can use this node after a displacement effect created black edges or spots on your footage. The effect will try to fill the hole using the original image and an extension of the displaced edges

meta.author: Moportfolio
meta.description: Creates a gradient of the images luminance to use as a displacement map

meta.author: Moportfolio
meta.description: Generates a drop-shadow under the input, based on the alpha channel

meta.author: Moportfolio
meta.description: Maps two colors over the image using the brightness levels

meta.author: Moportfolio
meta.description: Generates some texture-based particles to use as an overlay. Can be used to simulate dust, embers or just to add more detail to a scene.

meta.author: Moportfolio
meta.description: Tries to mask the edges in your picture using filters and gives you the option to color them.

meta.description: Creates a shine effect with visible streaks

meta.description: Blurs the edges of the image

meta.description: Applies an advanced Split-tone effect with controls optimized to recreate the colors of film.

meta.description: Add animated FilmGrain to your image!

meta.description: Adds more realistic filmgrain to the image, by reconstructing the image using grain, instead of simply applying it as an overlay

meta.author: Moportfolio
meta.description: Applies a collection of adjustable and modular film emulation effects, like film grain, vignetting, halation and more to the image.

meta.description: Generates hairs and splotches to simulate artifacts of old film strips

meta.description: Animated star-shaped glows!

meta.description: Adds displacement Glitch and artifacts

meta.description: A post-processing camera-like halation effect. Creates a red film-like glow around the highlights of the input

meta.author: Moportfolio
meta.description: Halftone effect with offset on each CMYK-channel to simulate printing halftone effects

meta.author: Moportfolio
meta.description: Generates a black and white halftone effect

meta.author: Moportfolio
meta.description: Gives you control over the hue, saturation, brightness and contrast of different hue ranges.

meta.description: Use Blenders inpaint effect on a dedicated region, to remove objects in an input by using its content

meta.description: Outputs "1" if the integer is even and outputs "0" if it's odd.

meta.description: Makes the input look like it's made out of paintstrokes and animates the strokes

meta.author: Moportfolio
meta.description: Creates a 3x3 grid of configurable values and colors, that you can use as a Kernel for Blenders "Convolve" and "Glare"-nodes. By default the Kernel is configured for laplacian edge detection.

meta.author: Moportfolio
meta.description: Generates a camera lens overlay of dirt, dust and hairs which become more visible when aligining with bright areas of the input

meta.description: A lower performance-demanding lens-flare, since it doesn't rely on Blenders glow effects, but procedurally generates effects

meta.description: A LensFlare based on Blenders Glow Effects. Performance-heavier than "MP_LensFlare"

meta.description: Customizeable and procedural lens flares with sharp streaks.

meta.author: Moportfolio
meta.description: Glows and mirros highlights of the image to simulate lens reflections

meta.author: Moportfolio
meta.description: Generates a Line between two points

meta.author: Moportfolio
meta.description: Repeats the input on one axis and animates each instance with a slight offset. Can be used with any input-image, but is designed to be used with MP_Comps SDFs "Mask"-output or the result of "MP_RenderSDF".

meta.description: Generates an animateable loading-bar element, which can be used for motion-graphics to create pseudo UI-elements

meta.description: Mirrors the input around a moveable and rotateable point.

meta.description: Emulates VHS and NTSC effects

meta.description: Tries to add handdrawn-like outlines to your scene. On transparent images, it will add an outline around the object, but the effect also works on opaque images

meta.description: Adds an outline around the input, by using its alpha channel. So the effect requires an input that has an alpha channel/transparency, to work like intended.

meta.description: Applies brush strokes to the image to create a painting effect.

meta.description: Simplifies the image into fewer colors to simulate oil paint

meta.author: Moportfolio
meta.description: Limits the amount of colors in an image. Similiar to Blenders "Posterize"-node, but gives more control on the individual channels. The amount of colors, is equal to the value "Shades"^3. So a "Shades"-value of 8, would result in a palette of 512 colors. Since this process is altered by the adjustment of the "Strength" and "Gamma" values of the effect, the number of visible colors will likely change

meta.author: Moportfolio
meta.description: Copies the transform of one element and applies it to the child element. So the child will automatically stick to the parent

meta.author: Moportfolio
meta.description: Uses Blenders 4 Corner Pin node to transform the image like its on a 2D-plane in a 3D-space

meta.description: Mimics JPEG compression artifacts.

meta.description: Blends between two inputs by creating a mask from the "Start"-footages luminance.

meta.description: Blends between two inputs by using a block noise that is mapped to the resolution of the input.

meta.description: Blends between two inputs by using Blenders "Glare"-node, to choose from multiple glow effects, like bloom, streaks, sun beams and ghosts.

meta.description: Slides footage over other footage by using a simple translation effect.

meta.description: Generates a texture displaying several space elements, like stars and nebula.

meta.author: Moportfolio
meta.description: Increases/Decreases the contrast of value-field linearly. This allows you to control the distance between the values of a float-field.

meta.author: Moportfolio
meta.description: Renders an input float-value as text. Intended to use for monitoring the output of math-nodes and for UI-elements. Can also be used as a counter-animation. Supports up to 4 digits before the "." and 3 digits after them.

meta.description: Generated Blinds on top of the image and adds a glow. Can also be used to create a scanline effect
Simulates VHS signal and tape effects

meta.description: A predefined look with many procedural textures to mimic the randomness and look of VHS charachteristics.

meta.description: Boosts the saturation of low-saturated colors
Colorizes the input while keeping some of the  inputs channels, to produce intense and natural looking hot colors

meta.description: Uses different render-passes to simplify the lighting of a render, to recreate the look of early 3D videogames
